---
title: "Import and Export Data"
---

```{=html}
<iframe class="slide-deck" src="slides/readr.html"></iframe>
```

[Slides in full screen](slides/readr.html){target="_blank"} | [Download PDF slides](slides_pdf/readr.pdf){download="readr.pdf"}

::: {.callout-tip}
## Exercises
Go to the [task page](tasks/readr.qmd) for the exercises.
:::

## Resources

- [Data import cheatsheet](https://rstudio.github.io/cheatsheets/data-import.pdf){target="_blank"}: A handy reference for importing data from text files, Excel files or Google Sheets into R.
- [readr package](https://readr.tidyverse.org/){target="_blank"}: Documentation for the readr package to read text files
- [readxl package](https://readxl.tidyverse.org/){target="_blank"}: Documentation for the readxl package to read Excel files
- [writexl package](https://docs.ropensci.org/writexl/){target="_blank"}: Documentation for the writexl package to write Excel files
- [haven package](https://haven.tidyverse.org/){target="_blank"}: Documentation for the haven package to read and write SPSS, Stata, and SAS files
- [googlesheets4 package](https://googlesheets4.tidyverse.org/){target="_blank"}: Documentation for the googlesheets4 package to read and write Google Sheets
